components.name: DataTable

components.name: WorkflowCanvas
components.description: Drag-and-drop visual workflow builder using ReactFlow
components.behavior: Uses ReactFlow for node/edge rendering. workflowEditorStore manages undo/redo history and dirty state. Supports zoom, pan, minimap. Auto-layout on load. Connection validation prevents invalid edges.

components.name: ActionNode
components.description: ReactFlow node representing a workflow action
components.behavior: Shows action type badge, name, status indicator. Click to open config panel. Drag handles on edges.

components.description: ReactFlow node representing the workflow trigger
components.behavior: Shows trigger type icon, config summary. Only one per workflow.

components.name: ConditionNode
components.behavior: Diamond shape showing condition summary. Two outgoing edges: true_branch and false_branch.

components.name: ConnectionLine
components.behavior: Animated when workflow is running, shows branch label (true/false)

components.name: WorkflowRunTable
components.behavior: Shows run number, trigger, status, duration, started_at. Click row to view logs.

workflows.description: Update workflow metadata (not canvas when active)

actions.description: Replace all actions for workflow (full canvas save)

workflow_runs.description: List all workflow runs with filters

webhooks.description: Public endpoint for incoming webhook triggers, no auth, validates X-Webhook-Secret header

stores.name: workflowEditorStore
stores.notes: Manages ReactFlow canvas state with undo/redo stack

stores.name: realtimeStore
stores.notes: Tracks which run IDs have active WebSocket subscriptions for live log streaming

events.name: workflow_run.started
events.client_action: invalidate workflowRuns.list, add run to realtimeStore subscriptions

events.name: workflow_run.completed
events.client_action: invalidate workflowRuns.detail, workflows.stats, update run status in list

events.name: workflow_run.failed
events.client_action: invalidate workflowRuns.detail, show error toast with action name

events.name: workflow_run.step_completed
events.client_action: append log entry to logEntries.byRun if run in realtimeStore subscriptions, highlight node in canvas

events.name: ws.reconnected
events.client_action: invalidate all active query keys, re-subscribe realtimeStore run subscriptions

flows.name: Create Workflow
cross_entity_updates: Workflow.status updated, trigger registered in scheduler/webhook registry

flows.name: Process Workflow Run
steps: Trigger fires (schedule cron | webhook incoming | event emitted)
Worker picks up job: execute actions sequentially
For each action: create LogEntry, emit workflow_run.step_completed via WebSocket
On completion: status=success; on error: retry if retry_count > 0, else status=failed
Emit workflow_run.completed or workflow_run.failed via WebSocket
cross_entity_updates: Workflow.run_count incremented, success_count or failure_count incremented, last_run_at updated

flows.name: Test Workflow
steps: Executes in sandbox mode (no side effects for email/slack/http — log only)
Returns WorkflowRun with full log trace via response and WebSocket stream
cross_entity_updates: run_count NOT incremented for sandbox runs

flows.name: Manage Integration
steps: Actions referencing this integration can now be configured

flows.name: Activate/Pause Workflow
steps: POST /workflows/:id/activate → status=active, trigger registered in scheduler/webhook registry
POST /workflows/:id/pause → status=paused, trigger deregistered, in-flight runs allowed to complete
cross_entity_updates: Workflow.status updated, Trigger.is_active toggled, scheduler/webhook registry updated

computed_fields.formula: success_count / run_count * 100 if run_count > 0 else null

domain_rules.rule: Active workflow cannot be edited directly — must duplicate or version
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 409 if status=active on PATCH canvas actions (PUT /workflows/:id/actions)
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show 'Duplicate to edit' banner in WorkflowBuilder when workflow is active

domain_rules.api_guard: Validate no cycles in action graph using DFS before saving
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Prevent creating connection in WorkflowCanvas that would form a cycle

domain_rules.rule: Webhook trigger URL contains org-scoped secret
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate X-Webhook-Secret header matches stored secret on POST /webhooks/:workflow_id
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Display webhook URL and secret in WebhookUrlDisplay component

domain_rules.api_guard: Count existing actions before insert, return 422 if count >= 100
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable 'Add action' button and show warning at 90+ actions

domain_rules.rule: Runs cannot be manually triggered for paused workflows
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 409 if workflow.status=paused on manual run trigger
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable 'Run Now' button and show paused status

domain_rules.api_guard: Encrypt config.credentials before insert, decrypt only in worker context. Never return raw credentials to client — return masked config only.
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show masked values in integration config form

generation_rules: WorkflowCanvas uses ReactFlow (@xyflow/react) for drag-drop node editing with custom node types (TriggerNode, ActionNode, ConditionNode)
workflowEditorStore manages undo/redo with immer-based state snapshots, max 50 history entries
Active workflows enforce read-only canvas: PATCH /workflows/:id/actions returns 409 with message 'Duplicate workflow to edit active version'
Actions validated server-side before run: check config schema per action_type, verify integration exists and is connected
Redis bullmq queue for async workflow job processing, separate queues per org for isolation
Worker executes actions sequentially, respects timeout_seconds per action, retries up to retry_count times with retry_delay_seconds backoff
WebSocket room pattern: join room workflow_run:{run_id} for live log streaming during runs
Integration credentials encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storing in JSONB config, key stored in environment secrets
All forms use React Hook Form with Zod schema validation
Every mutation hook implements onMutate (optimistic), onError (rollback), onSettled (invalidate)

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
